author: doll-agent
content:
Done. Added svd_hermitian(a) -> (U, S, Vt) in ferray-linalg as a sibling function (not a hermitian= parameter on svd, since that would break ~10 call sites).

Algorithm: route through eigh; sort indices by |eigenvalue| descending; build U with sign-flipped columns for negative eigenvalues so s = |λ| stays non-negative; Vt = transpose of unsigned Q reordered.

5 tests covering diagonal, singular-value match vs full SVD, U*diag(s)*Vt == A reconstruction, non-square rejection, negative-definite → positive singular values.

Re-exported at decomp::mod.rs and lib.rs root. ferray-linalg: 5 new tests, all passing, clippy clean. Commit 841722a1.
